flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Columbia Southern University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.8k → $6.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Columbia Southern University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.8k → $6.8k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Columbia Southern University rose 14% between 2017 and 2020 ($18.8k → $21.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Columbia Southern University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.1% → 0.0%).
